playbook_file.description: The playbook to be run by Ansible.

command.description: The command to invoke ansible. Defaults to ansible-playbook.

extra_arguments.description: Extra arguments to pass to Ansible. Not passed through a shell; do not quote.

ansible_env_vars.description: Environment variables to set before running Ansible (e.g. ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False).

user.description: The ansible_user to use. Defaults to the user running packer.

groups.description: The groups into which the Ansible host should be placed.

empty_groups.description: The groups which should be present in inventory file but remain empty.

host_alias.description: The alias by which the Ansible host should be known. Defaults to 'default'.

local_port.description: The port on which to attempt to listen for SSH connections (tries first available of 10).

ssh_host_key_file.description: The SSH key used to run the SSH server on the host machine to forward commands.

ssh_authorized_key_file.description: The SSH public key of the Ansible ssh_user. Defaults to a onetime generated key.

ansible_ssh_extra_args.description: Specifies --ssh-extra-args on command line; defaults to -o IdentitiesOnly=yes.

inventory_file_template.description: Template for the format of lines added to the temporary inventory file Packer creates.

inventory_directory.description: The directory in which to place the temporary generated Ansible inventory file.

inventory_file.description: The inventory file to use during provisioning instead of a temporary one.

keep_inventory_file.description: If true, the Ansible provisioner will not delete the temporary inventory file it creates.

ansible_proxy_key_type.description: Change the key type used for the adapter. Defaults to ECDSA.

sftp_command.description: The command to run on the machine to handle the SFTP protocol. Defaults to /usr/lib/sftp-server -e.

use_sftp.description: Whether to use SFTP for file transfers.

galaxy_file.description: A requirements file to install roles or collections before execution.

galaxy_command.description: The command to invoke ansible-galaxy. Defaults to ansible-galaxy.

roles_path.description: The path to the local directory in which to install Ansible roles.

collections_path.description: The path to the local directory in which to install Ansible collections.

use_proxy.description: Set up a localhost proxy adapter for Ansible. Defaults to true.

skip_version_check.description: If true, skip checking whether ansible is installed prior to running.

ansible_winrm_use_http.description: Force WinRM to use HTTP instead of HTTPS. Default: false.

timeout.description: Maximum time allowed for the provisioner to finish.

max_retries.description: Max times the provisioner will retry on failure. Defaults to 0.

only.description: Only run this provisioner for the listed builder(s) by name.
